creator: sasamotikomi@gmail.com
text:
Since development stopping and dazuko broken and remove from source tree need find solution on-access scanning for antivirus:
http://www.freshports.org/security/dazuko/

Posible is two solution:

ClamFS fuse based solution
http://clamfs.sourceforge.net/

Avfs is removed from ports tree:
http://www.freshports.org/sysutils/avfs/
correct last version is 1.0.2
http://sourceforge.net/projects/avf/files/avfs/1.0.2/
